levelName: Level 41: Switch Statements - Days of the Week
puzzleDescription: Learn how to use a 'switch' statement to select one of many code blocks to be executed based on a number input.
objective: Input a number (1–7) and display the day (1 = Monday, 7 = Sunday).
hints: Each day is a 'case' (e.g., case 1: System.out.println("Monday"); break;).
Don't forget the 'break;' statement after each case to prevent fall-through!
